title: Global Crude Exports Fall In June Non Opec Gains Share
section_path: Global Crude Exports Fall In June Non Opec Gains Share
section_path_text: Global Crude Exports Fall In June Non Opec Gains Share
summary:
Main
Global crude/condensate seaborne exports fell m-o-m to 38.5mbd in June, while Non-OPEC+ supplies sharply increased market share at the expense of Saudi Arabia. By Jay Maroo
Total crude/condensate exports fell by almost 180kbd in June, marking the fourth successive monthly decline and putting full-month exports at the lowest since August 2023. The largest declines in exports came from Saudi Arabia (600kbd lower) while UAE, Iraq (both 200kbd) and Kuwait (40kbd) also posted lower levels.
